parameters.query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.display_name, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id FROM users u WHERE u.is_active = true
SELECT h.symbol, h.net_quantity, h.avg_buy_price, h.total_invested FROM holdings h WHERE h.user_id = $1 AND h.net_quantity > 0

INSERT INTO daily_snapshots (user_id, snapshot_date, portfolio_value, total_pnl, day_pnl, holdings_detail) VALUES ($1, CURRENT_DATE, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (user_id, snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET portfolio_value = $2, total_pnl = $3, day_pnl = $4, holdings_detail = $5
